# rate

**Instance Property**

The group’s playback speed.

## Declaration

```swift
var rate: Double { get set }
```

## Adjusting Playback Speed

- **fadeRate(rate:duration:curveType:)**: Adjusts the playback speed of the sounds in a group gradually.
